item.title: Hey, necro response
item.content:encoded:
I think you are correct about reclassification. However, I think SCP-3720 should either be reclassified as Neutralized (since the assassination was successful) or the GOI that SCP-3720-1 works for should be given the SCP slot with the Appolyon designation since it's quite clear that the temperament of SCP-3720-X is completely up to luck and if we really pissed of SCP-3720-X it might just blow up the planet and there would be literally nothing the Foundation could do to even slow the process.

Think of it this way, what if SCP-3720-X was hired to kill SCP-682 or Codename : Gate Guardian?

Worse still, what if SCP-3720-X was hired to find a way to permanently kill Kondraki (since clearly a bullet didn't do it)?

Exactly.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is nice, I like the subversion of the fact that it's literally just a thing that kills you.
The interview is good too, definitely got a feel for the personality of the guy. Only thing I would say is that this should probably be a Keter, since they don't seem to be able to contain it at all. But +1 none the less.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this. It's a great mix of a classic espionage vibe and the WTF vibe characteristic of our site.
